args.command: mkdir -p /workspace/report /workspace/prs /workspace/testing/environments /workspace/testing/hardware /workspace/testing/reproductions /workspace/analysis /workspace/analysis/scripts /workspace/research/notes /workspace/decisions /workspace/sources
cd /workspace && git clone https://github.com/Light-Heart-Labs/DreamServer.git
cd /workspace/DreamServer && git fetch origin pull/*/head 2>&1 | head -100
cd /workspace/DreamServer && git fetch origin 2>&1 | head -50
cd /workspace/DreamServer && git branch -r | head -20
cd /workspace/DreamServer && git branch -r | grep -E "pull" | head -20
cd /workspace/DreamServer && git ls-remote --heads origin | grep -E "pull" | head -20
cd /workspace/DreamServer && gh pr list 2>&1 | head -100

cd /workspace/DreamServer && curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/Light-Heart-Labs/DreamServer/pulls?state=open&per_page=100" | python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'Total open PRs: {len(data)}'); [print(f\"PR #{p['number']}: {p['title']} ({p['user']['login']})\") for p in data]"

cd /workspace/DreamServer && for pr in 1057 1056 1055 1054 1053 1052 1051 1050 1049 1048 1047 1046 1045 1044 1043 1042 1040 1039 1038 1037 1036 1035 1034 1033 1032 1030 1029 1028 1027 1026 1025 1024 1023 1022 1021 1020 1019 1018 1017 1016 1015 1014 1013 1012 1011 1010 1009 1008 1007 1006 1005 1004 1003 1002 1000 999 998 997 996 994 993 992 991 990 988 983 974 973 966 961 959 750 716 364 351; do echo "=== PR $pr ==="; curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/Light-Heart-Labs/DreamServer/pulls/$pr" | python3 -c "import sys, json; p = json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'Title: {p[\"title\"]}'); print(f'Author: {p[\"user\"][\"login\"]}'); print(f'Base: {p[\"base\"][\"ref\"]}'); print(f'Head: {p[\"head\"][\"ref\"]}'); print(f'Body: {p[\"body\"][:500]}...' if len(p['body']) > 500 else p['body']); print('---')" 2>/dev/null || echo "Failed to fetch PR $pr"; done > /workspace/research/notes/pr-overview-1.txt 2>&1

cd /workspace/DreamServer && for pr in 1057 1056 1055 1054 1053 1052 1051 1050 1049 1048 1047 1046 1045 1044 1043 1042 1040 1039 1038 1037 1036 1035 1034 1033 1032 1030 1029 1028 1027 1026 1025 1024 1023 1022 1021 1020 1019 1018 1017 1016 1015 1014 1013 1012 1011 1010 1009 1008 1007 1006 1005 1004 1003 1002 1000 999 998 997 996 994 993 992 991 990 988 983 974 973 966 961 959 750 716 364 351; do curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/Light-Heart-Labs/DreamServer/pulls/$pr/files?per_page=100" | python3 -c "import sys, json; files = json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'PR {sys.argv[1]}: {len(files)} files changed'); [print(f'  {f[\"filename\"]} ({f[\"changes\"]} changes)') for f in files]; print('---')" $pr 2>/dev/null; done > /workspace/research/notes/pr-files-1.txt 2>&1

cd /workspace/DreamServer && curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/Light-Heart-Labs/DreamServer/pulls/1057/files?per_page=100" | python3 -c "import sys, json; files = json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'PR 1057: {len(files)} files changed'); [print(f'  {f[\"filename\"]} ({f[\"changes\"]} changes)') for f in files]"

cd /workspace/DreamServer && curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/Light-Heart-Labs/DreamServer/pulls/1057/files?per_page=100" | python3 -c "import sys, json; files = json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'PR 1057: {len(files)} files changed'); [print(f'  {f[\"filename\"]} ({f[\"changes\"]} changes)') for f in files if isinstance(f, dict)]"
